rationale: Bind the shared `self_.get_pagetable_by_pcid(pcid).unwrap().mapping_4k()` pivot so the disjoint triggers in r1's and r2's ensures conjuncts share an SMT canonical form, then case-split on Some/Some to chain `mp[va] == page_entry_to_map_entry(&r1->Some_0) == page_entry_to_map_entry(&r2->Some_0)`. The helper lemma converts the MapEntry-level equality (plus the perm.{present, ps, user} facts available in the schema-assume slices that triggered the `unknown`) into the closed-`view` equality via struct extensionality and the View function axiom.
